title: Armor Stand Have Hands | ASHH
description: This datapack will add hands to the armor stand.
body:
--------------------------------
__***This little datapack only adds two things:***__
- **Hands at the armor stand**
- **Armor stand customization**
---------------------------------

Now, if you put an armor stand, he will immediately have arms, but you can also remove his hands if you put a stick in the arm of the armor stand.
